text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Bandages, gauze wrap... Hmm, and some
antiseptic for good measure, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! No, that's not it. I'm just looking for things
to put in my bag.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Look. Isn't it cute? It matches my signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I thought it'd be nice to be prepared in case
someone gets hurt...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, I don't know about that.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
In any case, if you don't mind, would you be so
kind as to help me pick out a few things?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Super Creek's request, I look for some handy
items for her to carry around.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer. Look, it all fits
perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now I'll be able to provide emergency first aid if
someone gets hurt.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That goes for you too! If something ever happens
to you, make sure to let me know right away! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Even if it's during a race, okay?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Just call my name, and I'll just race to the
finish line faster than usual! You've got nothing to
worry abo—

text_block_list.name: Passionate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Your very hopes and dreams have been sewn into
that signature racewear of yours, haven't they?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...What's going on over there?

text_block_list.name: Passionate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You can't give up now! Tell me what it is you hope
for!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...To never lose... To never lose to anyone! That's
my dream!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hopes sewn into racewear...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...I just asked for my signature racewear to be
made with a nice design.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You said before that I'm considerate, but that's
not true.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I see someone getting hurt, I'm
overcome by a wave of sadness that makes it
hard for me to breathe.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I hate feeling that way... So the reason why I want
to help is really just because I'm selfish.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I have no desire to be thanked, nor do I want
anyone returning the favor.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
As long as people just accept me for who I am,
that's honestly more than enough.
choice_data_list: So your racewear was made with others in mind.
So your racewear was made with others in mind.

It's because you're sympathetic that you feel so
sad.

It's because you're sympathetic that you feel so
sad.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
As long as people just accept me for who I am,
that's honestly more than enough.
choice_data_list: So your racewear was made with others in mind.
So your racewear was made with others in mind.

It's because you're sympathetic that you feel so
sad.

It's because you're sympathetic that you feel so
sad.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness me...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I call myself selfish, yet you still somehow
find a way to see me in a positive light.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I believe you're the considerate one here, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! And someone as kind as you deserves to
be spoiled! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But well... I suppose you're right.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Even in the harsh world of racing, I want nothing
more than to be able to offer comfort to people.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's the hope I've placed in my signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek makes this statement with a gleam in
her eye, revealing to me a newfound resolve.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
What am I supposed to do when you say
something so sweet? I... I just...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I want to spoil you like there's no tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Since a coddling is in order, how about you rest
your head on my lap?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The texture of my racewear feels wonderful on
the skin!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Come on, now. Don't be shy! Let's take a little
break on that bench over there.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I want to give all the comfort in the world to kind
people and hard workers everywhere! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I somehow manage to put an end to Super
Creek's affectionate antics and avoid laying my
head on her lap.
